/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/second_pass_render.dir/tools/second_pass_render.cpp.o -o second_pass_render   -L/opt/nvidia/deepstream/deepstream-9.0/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/nvidia/deepstream/deepstream-9.0/lib:/usr/local/cuda-13.1/targets/x86_64-linux/lib -lgstbase-1.0 -lgstreamer-1.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 /usr/local/cuda-13.1/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/libcudart.so -lnvds_meta -lnvdsgst_meta -lnvds_utils
